_note: Marinade Finance liquid-staking program is Anchor-based. Layouts verified against mainnet fixtures (2026-07). Discriminators: sha256('global:<snake_case_name>')[..8]. Program address corrected from an earlier (nonexistent) roadmap placeholder — verified against docs.marinade.finance/developers/contract-addresses and a live getAccountInfo call.

f223c68952e1f2b6.name: deposit
f223c68952e1f2b6.note: Deposit native SOL, receive mSOL (minted or drawn from the liquidity pool's mSOL leg). 11 accounts.

1e1e77f0bfe30c10.name: liquid_unstake
1e1e77f0bfe30c10.note: Instant unstake: burn mSOL, receive SOL from the liquidity pool's SOL leg (minus a small fee). 10 accounts.

61a7906b75be8024.name: order_unstake
61a7906b75be8024.note: Delayed unstake: burn mSOL now, create a ticket account redeemable via claim() once the epoch matures. 8 accounts.

3ec6d6c1d59f6cd2.name: claim
3ec6d6c1d59f6cd2.note: Redeem a matured delayed-unstake ticket for SOL. No numeric args — amount is implicit in the ticket account. 6 accounts: state, reservePda, ticketAccount, transferSolTo, clock, systemProgram.
